title: citrus tumida
intro: Citrus tumida, also known as the desert lime or orange bush, is a shrub native to Western Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Citrus tumida include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The plant can be used to make various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infused oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
